extortion.description: Nunez Dental is a dental practice located in Jackson Heights, NY, dedicated to providing comprehensive dental services and ensuring patient satisfaction. With 37 years of experience, they have successfully served 36,000 patients, supported by a team of 31 skilled staff members. The practice boasts 10 master certifications, reflecting their commitment to high-quality dental care. They are open Monday through Friday and Saturday, offering flexible hours for their intended clientele.
